title: Replace And Install The ClearLink (CLINK) Controller
summary: Install a new ClearLink (CLINK) controller in place of the old controller, secure the controller box and panels, and restart the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.
when_to_use: Use when replacing an existing ClearLink (CLINK) controller with a new controller and restoring the operator station to service, as described in the installation section of the source manual.
not_for: Do not use when connection transfer details are unclear from the source or hardware labeling.
Do not use as a substitute for the separate operator station startup procedure; the source only references that procedure on page 66 and does not restate it here.

responsibilities: Transfer connections from the old controller to the new controller.
Mount and secure the new controller and controller box hardware.
Reinstall any removed side panels if necessary.
Restart the operator station using the referenced documented procedure.

safety_notes: Do not pinch any wires when feeding excess cable back into the stand.
Stop if connection transfer details are unclear from the source or hardware labeling.
Stop if wires cannot be routed back into the stand without pinching.
Escalate if the operator station does not restart normally after installation.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the controller box and stand
Access to top and/or bottom side panels if removed
Documented operator station restart procedure on page 66

access_required: Access to the controller box and stand
Access to top and/or bottom side panels if removed
system_preconditions: Old ClearLink (CLINK) controller has been removed and a replacement controller is available for installation.

visual_references.description: Maintenance diagram associated with ClearLink (CLINK) controller installation and connection transfer context on page 159.
Figure identifying the ClearLink (CLINK) controller and controller box location relevant to replacement context.

steps.title: Transfer controller connections
steps.purpose: Move all existing connections from the old controller to the replacement controller so the new controller is wired the same way as the removed unit.
steps.instruction: Transfer all the connections from the old controller to the new controller.
steps.expected_result: All connections from the old controller are moved to the new controller.
steps.healthy_condition: Each connection from the old controller has been transferred to the corresponding location on the new controller.
steps.failure_condition: Connection transfer details are unclear, incomplete, or cannot be matched from the source or hardware labeling.

actions.label: Transfer controller connections
actions.exact_action: Transfer all the connections from the old controller to the new controller.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Controller replacement context, connection points, wiring transfer locations, and any labeled ports or terminals related to reconnection.
Controller and controller box identification to confirm the correct hardware being replaced.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if connection transfer details are unclear from the source or hardware labeling.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transfer all the connections from the old controller to the new controller.
Maintenance diagram associated with ClearLink (CLINK) controller installation, showing the controller replacement context on page 159.
Figure identifying the ClearLink (CLINK) controller and its controller box location for removal and replacement.

steps.title: Mount the new controller in the box
steps.purpose: Secure the replacement controller into the controller box using the specified mounting hardware.
steps.instruction: Place the new controller in the box and fasten it with the two (2) M5 socket-head screws.
steps.expected_result: The new controller is positioned in the box and secured with the specified screws.
steps.healthy_condition: The controller is seated in the box and fastened with two (2) M5 socket-head screws.
steps.failure_condition: The controller cannot be properly seated or secured with the specified hardware.

actions.label: Install controller in box
actions.exact_action: Place the new controller in the box and fasten it with the two (2) M5 socket-head screws.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the new controller cannot be secured with the two (2) M5 socket-head screws.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Place the new controller in the box and fasten with the two (2) M5 socket-head screws.

steps.title: Hang the control box and route excess cable
steps.purpose: Position the controller box on the stand and route cable safely before final tightening.
steps.instruction: Hang the control box on the M8 button-head screws on the stand, and feed excess cable back into the stand without pinching any wires.
steps.expected_result: The control box is hung on the stand and excess cable is routed back into the stand without wire damage.
steps.healthy_condition: The control box is supported on the stand and excess cable is fed back into the stand with no pinched wires.
steps.failure_condition: Wires are pinched, cannot be routed safely, or the control box cannot be properly hung on the stand.

actions.label: Hang control box on stand
actions.exact_action: Hang the control box on the M8 button-head screws on the stand.

actions.label: Route excess cable
actions.exact_action: Feed excess cable back into the stand and not pinch any wires.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Controller replacement context on page 159 for control box placement and cable routing orientation.
Controller box location and replacement context relative to the stand.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if wires cannot be routed back into the stand without pinching.
Stop if the control box cannot be properly hung on the M8 button-head screws on the stand.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Hang the control box on the M8 button-head screws on the stand; feed excess cable back into the stand and not pinch any wires.
Maintenance diagram associated with ClearLink (CLINK) controller installation, showing the controller replacement context on page 159.
Figure identifying the ClearLink (CLINK) controller and its controller box location for removal and replacement.

steps.title: Tighten the controller box mounting screws
steps.purpose: Secure the controller box to the stand after it is positioned and cable routing is complete.
steps.instruction: Tighten the four (4) M8 button-head screws securing the controller box to the stand.
steps.expected_result: The controller box is firmly secured to the stand.
steps.healthy_condition: All four (4) M8 button-head screws are tightened and the controller box is secured to the stand.
steps.failure_condition: The controller box remains loose or cannot be secured with the four (4) M8 button-head screws.

actions.label: Tighten controller box hardware
actions.exact_action: Tighten the four (4) M8 button-head screws securing the controller box to the stand.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Controller replacement context showing controller box mounting area on page 159.
Controller box location to confirm the correct mounting assembly.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the controller box cannot be secured to the stand with the four (4) M8 button-head screws.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Tighten the four (4) M8 button-head screws.
Maintenance diagram associated with ClearLink (CLINK) controller installation, showing the controller replacement context on page 159.
Figure identifying the ClearLink (CLINK) controller and its controller box location for removal and replacement.

steps.title: Reinstall side panels if necessary
steps.purpose: Restore any removed guarding or enclosure panels after controller installation is complete.
steps.instruction: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.
steps.expected_result: Any removed top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled.
steps.healthy_condition: Required side panels are back in place.
steps.failure_condition: Required side panels cannot be reinstalled or remain removed when needed.

actions.label: Reinstall side panels
actions.exact_action: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if required top and/or bottom side panels cannot be reinstalled.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

steps.title: Restart the operator station
steps.purpose: Return the operator station to service after controller installation is complete.
steps.instruction: Re-start the operator station using the documented procedure referenced as "Starting The Operator Station" on page 66.
steps.expected_result: The operator station restarts normally using the referenced startup procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station restarts normally after installation.
steps.failure_condition: The operator station does not restart normally after installation.
stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the operator station does not restart normally after installation.

success_criteria: All connections from the old controller have been transferred to the new controller.
The new controller is installed in the box and fastened with two (2) M5 socket-head screws.
The control box is hung on the stand, excess cable is routed back into the stand without pinching wires, and the four (4) M8 button-head screws are tightened.
Any necessary top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled.
The operator station restarts normally using the referenced startup procedure.
healthy_conditions: Connections are transferred to the new controller.
The new controller is secured in the box.
The controller box is secured to the stand.
No wires are pinched during cable routing.
failure_conditions: Connection transfer details are unclear from the source or hardware labeling.
Wires cannot be routed back into the stand without pinching.
The controller or controller box cannot be secured with the specified hardware.
Required side panels cannot be reinstalled.
The operator station does not restart normally after installation.
escalation_guidance: Stop work if connection transfer details are unclear from the source or hardware labeling.
Stop work if excess cable cannot be routed back into the stand without pinching wires.
Escalate if the operator station does not restart normally after installation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: ClearLink (CLINK) controller installation and reconnection context on page 159.
Controller and controller box identification relevant to replacement context.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Transfer all the connections from the old controller to the new controller.

Place the new controller in the box and fasten with the two (2) M5 socket-head screws; hang the control box on the M8 button-head screws on the stand; feed excess cable back into the stand and not pinch any wires; tighten the four (4) M8 button-head screws; reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary; re-start the operator station.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide the detailed startup steps for "Starting The Operator Station"; it only references page 66.
The source packet does not provide torque values for the M5 or M8 hardware used in this installation section.
The source packet does not provide explicit LOTO requirements for this installation section.
The source packet does not provide a time estimate for this installation section.
The source packet does not provide detailed connection mapping beyond instructing transfer from old controller to new controller.
